title: Everything Korean
description: It adds Everything Korean. Plus some other random stuff.
body:
**Experience Korea in Minecraft with the Everything Korea Mod!**  

##### The Korean Version of Everything Japanese!
   
**Features:**  
- **Korean Blocks**: Authentic architectural elements for your builds.  
- **Traditional Foods**: Enjoy gimbap, ramyeon, and other iconic dishes.  
- **Unique Items**: From Hwandos to Hanbok, explore items that capture the essence of Korean.  
- **Dynamic Entities**: Interact with new entities inspired by Korean folklore and culture.  
- **Available for NeoForge**: Seamless integration with your existing setups. And with Everything Japanese

Dive into a world where you feel like you're in Korea!

**Download now and embark on a Korean adventure in Minecraft!**

# [Suggest Ideas](https://forms.gle/UAFq5rQCPzZTyWJf7)

##### If you enjoy Everything Korean and want  development to continue consider donating [here](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=5YH3R6EQK5628)
